name: Albatross
hint: Large seabirds known for their long wingspan and oceanic flights.

name: Blue Jay
hint: Small, blue and white birds known for their distinctive crest.

name: Canary
hint: Small songbirds often kept as pets, known for their melodious singing.

name: Duck
hint: Waterfowl with webbed feet and waterproof feathers, found in ponds and lakes.

name: Eagle
hint: Large birds of prey known for their keen eyesight and powerful talons.

name: Flamingo
hint: Tall wading birds with pink plumage and long, slender legs.

name: Gull
hint: Seabirds with white plumage and long wings, often seen near coastlines.

name: Hawk
hint: Birds of prey with sharp beaks and excellent hunting skills.

name: Ibis
hint: Long-legged wading birds with curved bills, often found in wetlands.

name: Jay
hint: Medium-sized songbirds with colorful plumage and noisy calls.

name: Kestrel
hint: Small falcons known for their hovering flight and hunting abilities.

name: Lark
hint: Small songbirds known for their melodious morning songs.

name: Magpie
hint: Birds with black and white plumage known for their thieving behavior.

name: Nightingale
hint: Small, melodious songbirds known for their beautiful nighttime singing.

name: Ostrich
hint: Large, flightless birds with long necks and powerful legs.

name: Peacock
hint: Colorful birds known for their extravagant and iridescent plumage.

name: Quail
hint: Small game birds often hunted for their meat and eggs.

name: Robin
hint: Small birds with orange-red breasts known for their cheerful songs.

name: Sparrow
hint: Small, common birds often found in urban areas.

name: Toucan
hint: Colorful birds with large, colorful bills found in tropical forests.

name: Umbrellabird
hint: Birds with unique umbrella-like crests on their heads.

name: Vulture
hint: Scavenging birds known for feeding on carrion.

name: Woodpecker
hint: Birds with strong bills used for drilling into trees in search of insects.

name: Xenops
hint: Small, insect-eating birds found in tropical forests.

name: Yellow Warbler
hint: Small, yellow songbirds known for their cheerful appearance.

name: Zebra Dove
hint: Small, gray birds with black and white stripes on their necks.
